title: RoadEvent
description: A single detected road anomaly event captured by the Asphalt SDK.

timestamp_ms.description: Unix epoch milliseconds (UTC) when the anomaly was detected.

latitude.description: WGS84 latitude of the anomaly location.

longitude.description: WGS84 longitude of the anomaly location.

accuracy_m.description: GPS horizontal accuracy in metres at time of event. Events with accuracy > 50m should be treated as low confidence.

intensity.description: Normalised anomaly intensity score from 0.0 (barely detectable) to 1.0 (severe). Derived from peak acceleration delta and gyroscope confirmation.

speed_kmh.description: Vehicle speed in km/h at time of event, used for speed-normalisation of intensity.

anomaly_type.description: Classification of the anomaly. 'unknown' when the signal pattern does not clearly match a known type.

sensor_summary.description: Condensed sensor statistics for the detection window. Raw samples are never transmitted.

accel_peak_z.description: Peak Z-axis accelerometer value (m/s^2) during the detection window.

accel_baseline_z.description: Rolling baseline Z-axis accelerometer value before the event (m/s^2). Typically close to 9.8 on flat road.

gyro_peak_magnitude.description: Peak magnitude of gyroscope vector during window (rad/s). Used to confirm physical motion rather than sensor noise.

sample_count.description: Number of accelerometer samples collected during the detection window.

window_duration_ms.description: Duration of the detection window in milliseconds.

device_meta.description: Anonymous device characteristics for calibration. No PII is collected. No device identifiers, IMEI, advertising IDs, or user accounts.

manufacturer.description: Device manufacturer string from Build.MANUFACTURER. Used to account for known sensor calibration differences across OEMs.

session_id.description: Anonymous session UUID generated at SDK start. Rotated each time Asphalt.start() is called. Never persisted across app restarts. Used only for grouping events within a single drive session.
